name: Claim denied after ladder fall on job, what now?
description: Appeal fast with lawyer and new proof.

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after ladder fall on job, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal fast with lawyer and new proof.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Appeal within 20 days in Utah, 21 in Idaho to the commission.**

Gather more evidence, request hearing. Common for disputed causation.

- Hire attorney; success rates rise.
- New medical opinions.
- Challenge insurer reasons.

Many overturned; don't miss deadline.
